channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Juan Soto starting to eliminate teams from negotiations, agent Scott Boras says
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Juan Soto is starting to drop teams from negotiations ahead of baseball's winter meetings next week. Likely to approach or set a record contract, the free agent slugger has met with the New York Yankees, New York Mets, Los Angeles Dodgers, Boston Red Sox and Toronto Blue Jays.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan's 7-foot newcomers earn themselves a nickname after their dynamic Big Ten debut
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Michigan has a nickname for its pair of 7-foot newcomers: Area 50-1. The tag was unveiled by the school on social media Tuesday night after Vladislav Goldin and Danny Wolf produced otherworldly numbers in a 67-64 victory at No. 11 Wisconsin to open the Big Ten schedule.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wiggins, Schieffelin and Clemson's defense hold down No. 4 Kentucky for a 70-66 win
item.description: Chauncey Wiggins scored 12 points and Ian Schieffelin had 11 points and a career-high 20 rebounds as Clemson shut down No. 4 Kentucky for a 70-66 victory in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Pete Iacobelli, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Iowa State and SMU athletic directors in a 'stay off my lawn' moment regarding latest rankings
item.description: Athletic directors at Iowa State and SMU are in a turf war over the latest College Football Playoff rankings, leading to a “stay off my lawn” moment on social media.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Goldin helps Michigan beat No. 11 Wisconsin 67-64 as Badgers take their 1st loss
item.description: Vladislav Goldin scored a career-high 24 points – including three straight baskets inside down the stretch – and Michigan defeated No. 11 Wisconsin 67-64 in the Big Ten opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Knicks beat Magic to advance in the NBA Cup. Orlando also moves on as the East wild card
item.description: Karl-Anthony Towns had 23 points and 15 rebounds, Jalen Brunson scored 21 points and the New York Knicks beat the Orlando Magic 121-106 on Tuesday to reach the quarterfinals of the NBA Cup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: St. John's to honor late coach Lou Carnesecca at men's and women's games this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The men's and women's basketball teams at St. John's will wear “Lou” patches on their uniform jerseys for the rest of this season to honor Hall of Fame coach Lou Carnesecca, who died Saturday at age 99. A funeral mass at St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tom Brady explains why he has 'mixed emotions' after seeing Azeez Al-Shaair's brutal hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: Tom Brady gave his opinion on the Azeez Al-Shaair hit against Trevor Lawrence, which led to an NFL suspension, and he questioned why the defense is always the ones at fault.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Robbie Gould resigns as head football coach at Rolling Meadows High School
item.description: District 214 officials have announced the resignation of former Chicago Bears kicker and Rolling Meadows Mustangs head football coach, Gould, after a 5-5 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: USWNT beats Netherlands 2-1 in goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher's final match
item.description: THE HAGUE, Netherlands (AP) — Alyssa Naeher ended her national team career with one last win. The stalwart goalkeeper made two critical saves in her final match for the United States, and the Americans beat the Netherlands 2-1 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan football fires offensive coordinator amid disappointing season
item.description: After an inept offensive performance by the offense during the 2024 season, the Michigan Wolverines head coach Sherrone Moore has fired offensive coordinator Kirk Campbell.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Miami's playoff hopes nosedive as Alabama rises in the latest College Football Playoff rankings
item.description: Miami’s playoff hopes took a nosedive while Alabama’s got a boost in the last rankings before the College Football Playoff bracket is set next weekend.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5
